visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in front of a glass-door freezer aisle in a large warehouse store. She gestures enthusiastically toward boxes of Häagen-Dazs ice cream bars. Large red and blue branding is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera zooms into a price label on the freezer shelf showing numerical values and product names. (3) The woman is shown again in a medium shot, smiling and pointing at the freezer. Yellow and purple text overlays appear at the bottom. (4) The woman reaches into the freezer and pulls out a large reddish-brown box with green graphics. (5) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting. Two women are seated at a table covered with multiple green and white boxes of ice cream. One woman wears a red hat and a yellow top. They hold the box and individual bars. (6) A close-up shot shows a hand breaking an ice cream bar in half. The interior is bright green matcha surrounded by a white coating and a thin wafer shell. (7) Both women are seen laughing and eating the product, gesturing with their hands toward the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Slogan]: 999元 特價200元. (3) [Slogan]: 哈根達斯 抹茶莓果雪酥. (4) [Subtitle]: 你這什麼笑容. (5) [Subtitle]: 難怪你今天一直拖著我來好市多. (6) [Subtitle]: 大家一定很好奇. [Variety]: 只有你好奇. (7) [Subtitle]: 日本製的新口味哦. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇. (9) [Subtitle]: 拜託你去日本要幸運的話才能買到. (10) [Subtitle]: 哎，999元哎. (11) [Subtitle]: 這快要跟上牛肉的價格. (12) [Subtitle]: 因為它一大盒啊. (13) [Subtitle]: 好，它有12入，然後每個是83.25元. (14) [Subtitle]: 妹妹拿吧... (15) [Subtitle]: 回去試看看究竟是讓我笑還是... (16) [Subtitle]: 一定讓你邊哭邊笑太好吃. [Variety]: 邊哭邊笑. (17) [Variety]: 錢包先哭一波. (18) [Subtitle]: 哈哈哈笑什麼? (19) [Subtitle]: 因為它真的太好吃了. (20) [Subtitle]: 各位他A了姐姐去買999元的雪酥. (21) [Subtitle]: 然後姐姐還在想，哎值得嗎? (22) [Variety]: 真的一直吃. (23) [Subtitle]: 結果發現真的好好吃. (24) [Slogan]: 濃抹甜莓雙享奢華雪酥. (25) [Subtitle]: 它的甜莓覆盆莓子醬哦! (26) [Subtitle]: 已經快要跟抹茶搶C位了. (27) [Subtitle]: 為什麼? 首先呢它的抹茶非常非常的抹. (28) [Subtitle]: 然後它外面包的那個白巧也是抹茶口味. [Variety]: 也是抹茶口味. (29) [Subtitle]: 所以它就不會太甜. (30) [Subtitle]: 如果你一直覺得哈根達斯死甜死甜的話這一款你去試可能會對它有所改觀. (31) [Subtitle]: 沒想到抹茶搭配覆盆莓子那麼搭. (32) [Subtitle]: 然後外面的那個抹茶威化餅也是酥酥脆脆. (33) [Subtitle]: 搭的很好口感完全... (34) [Subtitle]: 它雖然還是哈根達斯甜甜的雪酥, 但它在雪酥裡就是非常的抹. (35) [Subtitle]: 然後又有那覆盆莓的酸甜香. (36) [Subtitle]: 建議大家等它折200，好市多總是折200.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female creators appearing on camera; 1 male voice heard but not visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary woman has long dark hair and wears a white and black contrast dress. The second woman has shorter hair and wears a red hat with a yellow striped shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first location is a Costco warehouse aisle with industrial freezer units and bulk signage. The second location is a brightly lit home interior with a dining table, storage shelves, and plush toys in the background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female speech starts with bright pop BGM. Voices have a slight echo characteristic of a large indoor space. (2) A mechanical click and sliding sound of a freezer door is heard, followed by a male voice making a sarcastic remark. (3) Continuous rapid speech detailing numbers and prices. BGM beat is steady and driving. (4) Transition to a studio-clean acoustic environment. Loud, high-arousal female laughter dominates the mix. (5) A sharp, high-frequency crunch sound signifies a bite into a crispy snack. (6) Two female voices overlap in an enthusiastic exchange, with high pitch variability and rising intonations. (7) Sound of rustling packaging as products are handled, ending with a final enthusiastic summary.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a new Häagen-Dazs ice cream flavor found at Costco, emphasizing its value, taste profile, and the specific discount available to encourage viewers to purchase.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing information, focus on brand packaging, and positive review of the flavor profile.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy social media format with vibrant overlays to appeal to value-conscious food enthusiasts.
